description: Create a new Music-On-Hold (MOH) context for the holiday season in Vicidial (User: 6666, Pass: andromeda). Create a new MOH Class with the following settings: MOH ID 'HOLIDAY25', MOH Name 'Holiday Promo 2025', Active 'Y', Random Order 'Y', and User Group '---ALL---'. Upload the audio files 'holiday_jingle.wav' and 'seasonal_offer.wav' from /home/ga/Documents/Audio/ to this new class.
